Appearances:
Plaintiff City View Storage, LLC. is present. Represented by Seamus Canning.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jason Hubbert is present.
Attorney Brendan E. Radke representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel meet and confer re settlement discussions in Dept. 303 with visiting Judge Lynn Taylor-O'Malley.

This case settled per Judge Taylor-O'Malley.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
